title: trachypleurum tenuissimum
intro: Trachypleurum tenuissimum, also known as Thin-leaved trachypleurum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Trachypleurum tenuissimum include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
